markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new hires and present GrowthX's new engagement model for prospects, including a strategy sprint approach.](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [14 new team members introduced across various roles (content managers, executive assistants, directors)](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [New "Strategy Sprint" model: 8-week, $20k paid scoping period to align expectations and set strategy before long-term engagements](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Shifting to more specialized teams for strategy sprints vs. execution, aiming to improve consistency and customer success](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Pausing programmatic SEO sales until platform readiness (target: June 16th for internal onboarding)](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Introductions

  - [14 new team members introduced themselves, representing diverse roles and locations (e.g., Nigeria, Brazil, Croatia, South Africa)](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Common interests among new hires: gaming, outdoor activities, reading, and fitness](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

### Current Engagement Model Issues

  - [Misalignment between sales promises and delivery realities](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Over-focus on word count/page metrics instead of value](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Inconsistent content quality expectations across clients](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [No clear process for GrowthX to opt out of poor-fit engagements](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Challenges with new team members handling new accounts simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

### Strategy Sprint Approach

  - [6-8 week paid ($20k) scoping period before long-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Deliverables: ICP/persona validation, editorial roadmap, competitor analysis, voice/style guides, benchmark content](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Mutual opt-out option at end of sprint](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Specialized team led by Marcel to handle strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Aims to provide value even if client doesn't continue long-term](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

### Post-Strategy Sprint Execution

  - [12-month term with upfront payment preferred](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Standardized "packages" (small, medium, large) for editorial work](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Flexible scope for non-material changes within agreed framework](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Improved handoff to execution teams with clear strategy and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

### Platform Development

  - [Internal platform onboarding target: June 16th](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Pausing programmatic SEO sales until platform readiness](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Close \~8 outstanding proposals and initiate strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - Finalize strategy sprint team composition
  - [Retroactively apply strategy sprint deliverables to existing customers](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Team members to flag struggling clients for immediate attention](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Continue refining the new engagement model based on market feedback and learnings](https://fathom.video/share/dxfSjywAYrG41yHoqdR6CqKjK3qh3pi5?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
